assertionResults.title: shows precip probability + volume when both are above threshold

assertionResults.title: shows probability alone when ≥40% but volume is below 1mm

assertionResults.fullName: defaultSummary omits precip clause entirely when both metrics are below threshold
assertionResults.title: omits precip clause entirely when both metrics are below threshold

assertionResults.title: rounds half-degree temps to nearest integer
